roa.docketEntryComment: Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance
Pre-Sentenced Defendant Electronic Monitoring After Release and Report
CONFIDENTIAL APD Memorandum to the San Francisco Superior Court

/TWS/CH3 ISS CPROB PROB 1 Y PJ 8D/CTS 8/WS/VF2 150/30    CAPD MISD REST RORT, DOP/X: MATTER IS REFERRED  TO THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT'S RESTITUTION UNIT FOR DETERMINATION OF MISDEMEANOR VICTIM RESTITUTION AND FROM CASE#22001443(HARVEY WAIVER)/RESTRPT:06-30-22/CONTD:MISDEMEANOR RESTITUTIONREPORT FROM ADULT PROBATION IN DEPARTMENT 30/DAWF/CTORD:THE DEFENDANT TO UNDERGO 12 WEEKS OF OUTPATIENT TREATMENT IN THE  HEALTHRIGHT 360  PROGRAM INSAN MATEO COUNTY/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/SA2:845 MARKET ST,, SF/SAORD/SATERM/SUSFF/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/REMA/

/CAL BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDNC/SAWD/X THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTIO TO ADD COUT 3, A MISDEMEANOR CHARGE OF 484(A)PC, IS GRANTED/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA(S) OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:3/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATEDDISPOSITION/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LDPX:06-20-22 (60TH)/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA4:SEPHORA AT 845 MARKET ST,/SAORD/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE05-04-22 DEPT 11/DOP/
